Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1: OR -> MS -> QS -> AS -> IQC -> AS -> TST -> RT -> TST -> PK -> LB -> DP -> D. So after first IQC, they go back to AS, then TST, then fail, then RT, then TST again. So IQC is not a loop itself; it seems that after TST, if test fails, you go to RT and back to TST. That is a classic test-rework loop. In case 1, after TST, they do RT, then TST again. In case 2, they do TST and then go to PK. In case 3, they have TST -> RT -> TST -> PK. In case 4, they have TST and then PK. In case 5, they have TST -> RT -> TST -> RT -> TST.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1: AS, IQC, AS, TST. Case 2: AS, IQC, AS, TST. Case 3: AS, IQC, IQC, AS, IQC, AS, TST. Case 4: AS, TST. Case 5: AS, IQC, AS, IQC, AS, TST.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The assembly/quality phase can be modeled as a loop * (AS, IQC) where after AS, you choose to either exit to TST or execute IQC and then AS again.

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Case 3: AS, IQC, IQC, AS, IQC, AS, TST. This does not fit * (AS, IQC) because after the first IQC, they should go to AS, not to another IQC.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Alternative * (IQC, AS) does not match because we start with AS first. Other structures like * (IQC, AS) with initial AS do not fully fit.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Model the assembly/quality phase as a loop * (AS, B) where B is itself a loop * (IQC, tau) to allow multiple IQC in a row.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This model generates all cases: Case 4: AS then exit. Cases 1,2: AS, IQC, AS then exit. Case 5: AS, IQC, AS, IQC, AS then exit. Case 3: AS, IQC (continue inner), IQC, AS, IQC, AS then exit.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: All cases start with OR, MS, QS sequential. LB optional via XOR with silent. Testing loop * (TST, RT). Full chain via StrictPartialOrder.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Define transitions, silent tau, inner_loop = OperatorPOWL(LOOP, [IQC, tau]), assembly_loop = OperatorPOWL(LOOP, [AS, inner_loop]), test_loop = OperatorPOWL(LOOP, [TST, RT]), lb_choice = OperatorPOWL(XOR, [LB, tau]), root = StrictPartialOrder(nodes=[OR,MS,QS,assembly_loop,test_loop,PK,lb_choice,DP,D]), add edges OR->MS->QS->assembly_loop->test_loop->PK->lb_choice->DP->D.
